d17s0.caption: First look at Mather, then drift west along the flat Rim Trail — the crowd is gone within 400 m and the Yavapai geology window explains everything you're seeing.
d17s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><polyline points='10,96 50,86 90,100 130,88 180,98 230,86 280,96 330,90' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3'/><text x='92' y='44' font-size='11' fill='#B98A56' font-weight='700' letter-spacing='2'>GRAND CANYON — 1.8 KM DEEP</text><path d='M116,66 L128,54 L140,66 Z' fill='#E8D5BB' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='1.5'/><path d='M216,62 L228,50 L240,62 Z' fill='#E8D5BB' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='282' cy='96' r='5' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='250' y='116' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='264' y='118' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Mather Pt</text><rect x='276' y='130' width='52' height='24' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='282' y='141' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 + VC</text><text x='282' y='151' font-size='8' fill='#B01E24'>full by 9am ⚠</text><path d='M274,104 C220,116 160,114 70,112' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='150' y='132' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00'>Rim Trail — flat, paved, ◂ west</text><text x='142' y='102' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='96' y='150' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Yavapai Geology Museum</text><text x='96' y='162' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>best explainer + A/C + the window</text><text x='16' y='134' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>▸ Village, lodges,</text><text x='16' y='146' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>shuttle hub</text><text x='80' y='200' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>crowds evaporate 400 m from any parking lot</text></svg>

d17s1.caption: Side view, not a map: every step down is a hotter step you owe back. The 1.5-Mile Resthouse is the line — below it, July does the deciding, not you.
d17s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='96' y='24' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>down = optional · up = mandatory</text><path d='M20,56 L92,56 L112,84 L152,98 L184,132 L218,152 L252,188 L330,202 L330,235 L20,235 Z' fill='#F3E4CE'/><path d='M20,56 L92,56 L112,84 L152,98 L184,132 L218,152' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3.5'/><path d='M218,152 L252,188 L330,202' fill='none' stroke='#9AA1A8' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><text x='24' y='46' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>RIM 2,100 m · ~29°C</text><circle cx='88' cy='54' r='4' fill='#00693C'/><text x='60' y='72' font-size='9.5' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>trailhead</text><circle cx='114' cy='84' r='4' fill='#5A6068'/><text x='120' y='78' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>tunnel 📷</text><rect x='210' y='138' width='14' height='10' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='150' y='172' font-size='11' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⭐ 1.5-Mile Resthouse</text><text x='150' y='185' font-size='10.5' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>TURN AROUND HERE</text><text x='240' y='222' font-size='9.5' fill='#9AA1A8'>Havasupai Gardens · river — NOT in July</text><text x='240' y='96' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24'>+5–8°C every</text><text x='240' y='108' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24'>300 m down</text><text x='24' y='222' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>2× water · salty snacks · climbing out takes 2× as long</text></svg>

d17s2.caption: The red-line shuttle is the only way onto Hermit Road. Hopi is the sunset classic; if it's mobbed, Mohave one stop on is nearly as good and half as crowded.
d17s2.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 170' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M30,85 H310' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='310' cy='85' r='7' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='252' y='64' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Village — board here ▸</text><circle cx='262' cy='85' r='4' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='240' y='108' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>Trailview</text><circle cx='216' cy='85' r='4' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='196' y='64' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>Powell Pt</text><circle cx='160' cy='85' r='8' fill='#F5C518' stroke='#8A6D00' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='128' y='114' font-size='11' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ HOPI PT 📷</text><text x='134' y='127' font-size='9' fill='#8A6D00'>sunset — walk 100 m for elbow room</text><circle cx='110' cy='85' r='4' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='88' y='64' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>Mohave — plan B</text><circle cx='30' cy='85' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='14' y='108' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>Hermits Rest</text><text x='40' y='152' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>every 10–15 min · board 60–75 min pre-sunset · light for the ride back</text></svg>

d18s3.caption: It's a drive-through park: one road, north to south. If you only stop twice, make it the Route 66 Studebaker and Crystal Forest.
d18s3.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><ellipse cx='60' cy='42' rx='30' ry='10' fill='#E8B4B8' opacity='0.7'/><ellipse cx='90' cy='56' rx='26' ry='8' fill='#C9A9D9' opacity='0.6'/><text x='36' y='76' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>Painted Desert</text><path d='M170,22 V226' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='6'/><text x='182' y='20' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>▾ enter from I-40 (north)</text><circle cx='170' cy='44' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='184' y='48' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Painted Desert overlooks 📷</text><circle cx='170' cy='80' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='42' y='84' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Route 66 Studebaker</text><circle cx='170' cy='116' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='184' y='120' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Newspaper Rock petroglyphs</text><circle cx='170' cy='152' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='72' y='156' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Blue Mesa (if time)</text><circle cx='170' cy='188' r='7' fill='#F5C518' stroke='#8A6D00' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='184' y='186' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Crystal Forest</text><text x='184' y='198' font-size='9' fill='#8A6D00'>THE 20-min log walk</text><circle cx='170' cy='218' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='52' y='222' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Rainbow Forest Museum</text><text x='182' y='238' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>▾ exit south → US-180 → I-40 E</text><text x='236' y='226' font-size='9.5' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>gates close ~7pm ⚠</text></svg>

d19s1.caption: Through the turnstile, 300 m straight into the field. Shoot from the east side at sunset so the low light rims the fins; paint with the wind at your back.
d19s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='40' cy='72' r='12' fill='#F5C518'/><text x='22' y='98' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00'>sunset ▸ west</text><line x1='104' y1='112' x2='120' y2='82' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='128' y1='112' x2='144' y2='82' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='152' y1='112' x2='168' y2='82' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='176' y1='112' x2='192' y2='82' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='200' y1='112' x2='216' y2='82' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='224' y1='112' x2='240' y2='82' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='96' y='66' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>10 Cadillacs · oldest (west) → newest (east)</text><text x='258' y='104' font-size='14'>📷</text><text x='236' y='126' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>shoot from the east</text><text x='250' y='138' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>backlit fins</text><path d='M172,118 V196' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='184' y='162' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00'>300 m walk</text><circle cx='172' cy='200' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='184' y='205' font-size='9.5' fill='#22262A'>turnstile gate</text><path d='M10,216 H330' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='6'/><text x='16' y='234' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>frontage rd (park on the shoulder) · I-40 beyond</text><text x='226' y='182' font-size='9.5' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⚠ paint downwind</text><text x='40' y='196' font-size='9.5' fill='#00693C'>bring cans · take empties</text></svg>

d20s1.caption: The gates frame the minute of the blast: walk in through 9:01, out through 9:03. Chairs face the pool; the Survivor Tree watches from the terrace above.
d20s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='16' fill='#7FA96B'/><rect x='167' y='70' width='6' height='12' fill='#8B6F47'/><text x='192' y='56' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Survivor Tree</text><text x='192' y='68' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>1995 blast survivor — terrace above</text><rect x='84' y='96' width='14' height='48' fill='#C9A227'/><text x='78' y='88' font-size='11' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>9:01</text><rect x='242' y='96' width='14' height='48' fill='#C9A227'/><text x='238' y='88' font-size='11' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>9:03</text><rect x='102' y='108' width='136' height='24' fill='#CFE3F2' stroke='#8FB8D8' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='134' y='124' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>reflecting pool</text><g fill='#B98A56'><rect x='118' y='156' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='134' y='156' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='150' y='156' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='166' y='156' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='182' y='156' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='198' y='156' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='120' y='172' width='5' height='5'/><rect x='136' y='172' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='152' y='172' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='168' y='172' width='5' height='5'/><rect x='184' y='172' width='7' height='7'/><rect x='200' y='172' width='7' height='7'/></g><text x='104' y='198' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Field of Empty Chairs — 168, 19 small</text><path d='M62,96 V148' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='3 4'/><text x='14' y='120' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>the Fence —</text><text x='14' y='131' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>leave a token</text><rect x='252' y='42' width='58' height='20' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='258' y='56' font-size='9' fill='#22262A'>museum ($)</text><text x='96' y='226' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>free · open 24/7 · lit chairs after dark · quiet</text></svg>

d22s0.caption: Built down a hillside — plan one big loop, not back-and-forth. Numbers = order; the cave's 16°C is your 1–3pm air conditioning.
d22s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='60' cy='84' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='56' y='88' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='700'>1</text><text x='74' y='80' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Time Traveler</text><text x='74' y='92' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>spinning coaster — FIRST</text><circle cx='272' cy='92' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='268' y='96' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='700'>2</text><text x='230' y='76' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Outlaw Run</text><text x='222' y='112' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>wooden, 81° drop</text><circle cx='196' cy='142' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='192' y='146' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='700'>3</text><text x='210' y='140' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Marvel Cave</text><text x='210' y='152' font-size='9' fill='#8A6D00'>free · 1–3pm · 16°C · 600 stairs</text><text x='96' y='128' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>craft square</text><text x='84' y='140' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>glassblowing demos ⭐</text><text x='92' y='170' font-size='11'>🍞</text><text x='106' y='172' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00' font-weight='700'>Sullivan Mill cinnamon bread</text><path d='M170,214 V186 M170,186 C140,168 110,150 84,98 M170,186 C204,170 240,150 262,106 M170,186 C180,168 190,158 194,152' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><circle cx='170' cy='216' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#00693C' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='182' y='222' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>▴ entry — tram from 🅿</text><text x='60' y='236' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>steep hollow: real shoes, one planned loop</text></svg>

d23s1.caption: Tram entry is beneath the Arch on the west side (30 min early for security). The full-curve photo needs distance — Old Courthouse steps do it.
d23s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='292' y='10' width='48' height='220' fill='#CFE3F2'/><text x='306' y='120' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068' transform='rotate(-90 312 120)'>Mississippi River</text><path d='M148,192 Q196,18 244,192' fill='none' stroke='#9AA1A8' stroke-width='7'/><rect x='172' y='178' width='48' height='14' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='118' y='210' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>museum + tram entry (free museum)</text><text x='128' y='222' font-size='9.5' fill='#B01E24'>security — arrive 30 min early ⚠</text><rect x='56' y='118' width='28' height='22' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='70' cy='112' r='7' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='36' y='158' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='24' y='172' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Old Courthouse steps</text><text x='30' y='184' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>full arch fits in frame</text><circle cx='120' cy='84' r='8' fill='#B9CDB4'/><circle cx='260' cy='120' r='8' fill='#B9CDB4'/><circle cx='104' cy='150' r='7' fill='#B9CDB4'/><text x='196' y='60' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>tram pods climb inside the legs</text><text x='210' y='236' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00'>sunset silhouette: east bank across the river</text></svg>
